_spec: Sprint 3 Wave 2 status effect system. 4 base statuses + 2 combo reactions.
_principle: Explicit field consumption. Status keys (burn/freeze/poison/shock) are locked - never rename, only add new statuses.

burn.label: 燃烧
burn._note: Percent-based per PM. Strong vs high-HP enemies. Re-applying refreshes duration but does not stack damage.

freeze.label: 冰冻
freeze._note: Pure CC. No damage. Re-applying refreshes duration. Visual: blue tint on enemy sprite.

poison.label: 中毒
poison._note: Linear stacking up to 5. Each stack adds 5 fixed damage per tick. Refresh on each application.

shock.label: 感电
shock._note: Instant trigger. Chains to chainTargets nearest enemies within chainRadiusPx, dealing chainDamageRatio * playerATK each. Not a persistent state. Per PM 2026-04-11: chainRadiusPx is the explicit field, not embedded in _note.

detonate.label: 引爆
detonate._note: Per PM: consumes both burn and poison to prevent infinite loops. AOE 60px applies 1 stack of poison to nearby enemies (allows chain detonation but cools down naturally).

shatter.label: 碎冰
shatter._note: Consumes freeze only (shock is instant, nothing to consume). Doubles current damage instance. Triggers crit_ring visual + SHATTER text.

enemyStatusStruct._doc: Flat object on each enemy: enemy._statuses = { burn: { until, lastTick }, freeze: { until }, poison: { until, lastTick, stacks }, shock: null }
enemyStatusStruct._perfNote: Per GD risk 3: avoid array iteration. Direct key lookup for all status checks.

implementation.applyStatusHook: damage() function entry checks _damageImmuneUntil first (Wave 1), then applies new status from imbue weapon, then checks reaction conditions
implementation.tickHook: main game loop: for each enemy, check expired statuses and tick active dot statuses
implementation.reactionCheckHook: after applying new status, immediately check if reaction conditions are met (burn+poison or freeze+shock)

_knownGaps._note: Same online sync epic. Status effects are server-authoritative in multiplayer; client display only.
